mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookshelf (user_id, novel_id, last_read_chapter_num, last_read_time, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{novelId}, #{lastReadChapterNum}, #{lastReadTime}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bookshelf WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND novel_id = #{novelId}

SELECT b.id as bookshelfId, b.last_read_chapter_num as lastReadChapterNum, b.last_read_time as lastReadTime, b.create_time as addTime, n.id as novelId, n.title as novelTitle, n.author as author, n.cover as cover, n.intro as intro, n.status as status, n.view_count as viewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chapter WHERE novel_id = n.id) as totalChapters, (SELECT title FROM chapter WHERE novel_id = n.id ORDER BY chapter_num DESC LIMIT 1) as lastChapterTitle FROM bookshelf b INNER JOIN novel n ON b.novel_id = n.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.last_read_time DESC, b.create_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bookshelf WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND novel_id = #{novelId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookshelf WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND novel_id = #{novelId}
